prompt:
Sports action photography (intended use).
Scene: a steep overhanging granite wall at sunset, sunset golden-orange light raking across the textured rock, valley below in soft bokeh.
Subject: a male rock climber caught mid-move reaching for the next hold, full body visible in powerful dynamic stance, sharp focus on the climber.
Key details: photorealistic; chalk-dusted hands, red climbing shoes, a green tank top; body muscles engaged; light catching the chalk cloud; shallow depth of field blurring the distant landscape; peak-action moment captured.
Constraints: no other climbers, no text, no watermark, no logos.
